panels.description: Total HTTP request rate across all routes (excluding admin)
panels.title: Total Request Rate

panels.description: Percentage of responses that are 2xx or 3xx (non-error)
panels.title: Success Rate

panels.description: Percentage of non-4xx/5xx responses per route
panels.title: Success Rate by Route

panels.description: Memory usage of Envoy proxy containers
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: CPU usage of Envoy proxy containers
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Downstream request latency percentiles (p50, p90, p99)
panels.title: Request Latency Percentiles

panels.description: Upstream response latency percentiles (p50, p90, p99)
panels.title: Upstream Response Latency Percentiles

panels.description: Request rate broken down by upstream route/cluster
panels.title: Request Rate by Route

panels.description: Rate of 4xx and 5xx error responses per route
panels.title: Response Error Rate by Route

panels.description: Downstream connections by HTTP protocol version
panels.title: Downstream Connections by Protocol

panels.description: Bytes received and transmitted per second on downstream connections
panels.title: Bytes In / Out

panels.description: External authorization decisions: allowed, denied, and errors
panels.title: ext_authz Decisions

panels.description: Rate of requests that matched no route
panels.title: No Route Requests

targets.expr: gateway:~"^($gateway)$" vhost:~"$vhost" {source_type="kubernetes_logs", kubernetes.pod_labels.app_kubernetes_io_name="envoy"} | stats count() as lines
gateway:~"^($gateway)$" vhost:~"$vhost" {source_type="kubernetes_logs", kubernetes.pod_labels.app_kubernetes_io_name="envoy"} AND level:"error" | stats count() as errors
gateway:~"^($gateway)$" vhost:~"$vhost" {source_type="kubernetes_logs", kubernetes.pod_labels.app_kubernetes_io_name="envoy"} AND level:"warning" | stats count() as warnings
